name: BigBasket
overview_text: BigBasket is an Indian e-commerce company that operates a grocery delivery service. It was founded in 2011 by Vipul Parekh and Sachin Karpe.
headquarters_address: 2nd Floor, RZ-2A, Block 2, Vatika Business Park, Sec-49, Sohna Road, Gurgaon 122008

description: BigBasket is an Indian e-commerce company that operates a grocery delivery service. It was founded in 2011 by Vipul Parekh and Sachin Karpe.
vision_statement: To be the most loved and trusted online grocery destination in India, making healthy eating accessible to every household.
mission_statement: To revolutionize the grocery shopping experience through technology, quality, and convenience.

core_values.Customer Obsession: Delighting customers with an unparalleled shopping experience.
core_values.Innovation: Continuously innovating and improving our services to stay ahead.
core_values.Teamwork: Collaborating with our team members to achieve excellence.
core_values.Integrity: Maintaining the highest standards of ethics and transparency.

sales_motion: BigBasket's sales motion involves a multi-channel approach, including online ordering, mobile apps, and in-store pickups.
customer_acquisition_cost: BigBasket's customer acquisition cost is estimated to be around ₹500-₹1000 per customer.
customer_lifetime_value: BigBasket's customer lifetime value is estimated to be around ₹10,000-₹20,000 per customer.
cac_ltv_ratio: BigBasket's CAC-LTV ratio is estimated to be around 2.5-5, indicating a healthy customer acquisition strategy.
churn_rate: BigBasket's churn rate is estimated to be around 10-15% per annum, indicating a moderate level of customer retention.
net_promoter_score: BigBasket's Net Promoter Score (NPS) is estimated to be around 20-30, indicating a moderate level of customer satisfaction.
customer_concentration_risk: BigBasket's customer concentration risk is moderate, with a high dependence on a few large customers.
exit_strategy_history: BigBasket has a history of successful exits, including a ₹9,500 crore investment from Alibaba Group in 2018.
carbon_footprint: BigBasket's carbon footprint is estimated to be around 100-150 kg CO2e per ton of groceries sold, indicating a moderate level of sustainability.
ethical_sourcing: BigBasket has implemented various initiatives to promote ethical sourcing, including fair trade practices and sustainable agriculture.
benchmark_vs_peers: BigBasket's benchmark against peers indicates a strong performance in terms of customer acquisition and retention.
industry_associations: BigBasket is a member of various industry associations, including the Indian Retail Association and the Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry.
case_studies: BigBasket has published several case studies on its website, highlighting successful customer acquisition and retention strategies.
company_maturity: BigBasket is a mature company, with a strong presence in the Indian e-commerce market and a proven track record of innovation.
brand_value: BigBasket's brand value is estimated to be around ₹10,000-₹20,000 crores, indicating a strong and recognizable brand.
client_quality: BigBasket's client quality is high, with a strong focus on customer satisfaction and retention.
sustainability_csr: BigBasket has implemented various sustainability initiatives, including reducing plastic usage and promoting sustainable agriculture.
crisis_behavior: BigBasket has demonstrated a strong crisis management behavior, including a swift response to customer complaints and a commitment to transparency.
